description_long: This object is a solar energy infrastructure installation featuring a large array of rectangular photovoltaic panels mounted on a flat, rectangular base. The panels are arranged in a grid formation, elevated above a yellow platform that likely represents a rooftop or ground surface. Adjacent to the solar array, there are several box-like structures, possibly representing electrical inverters, control units, or maintenance access points. The mounting structure appears robust, with visible supports beneath the panels, suggesting a fixed installation. The color palette is dominated by gray and yellow, with some black and white accents, giving the installation a modern, industrial appearance. The overall design is compact and efficient, suitable for urban deployment on rooftops or dedicated solar fields.
description: A compact solar energy installation with a grid of gray photovoltaic panels on a yellow base, featuring adjacent control units and robust mounting supports.
description_view_0: From this view, the full grid of solar panels and the yellow base are clearly visible, with control units positioned at one end.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the installation, showing the elevation of the panels above the base and the arrangement of the control units.
description_view_2: The rear view emphasizes the length of the solar array and the linear arrangement of the panels, with minimal detail on the control units.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the opposite side, focusing on the height of the panel supports and the proximity of the control units to the array.
attribute_panel_orientation: tilted at approximately 20 degrees, facing a single direction, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with an aluminum frame and steel supports
attribute_array_configuration: single grid of approximately 4x8 panels, arranged in a rectangular block
